title: Prospecting Picks
description: Prospecting pick that searches for nearby ores within a configurable radius
body:
Adds a prospecting pick that searches for nearby ores within a configurable radius around the stone-type block mined. Best paired with a datapack or mod that makes ore clusters larger and/or more sparse. Can also detect ore veins based on the presence of raw ore blocks.

Ores searched for are defined in the config file. They must have a _forge:ores/<your_ore>_ tag.
